research.notes: Health UI users include elderly (cognitive decline, motor impairment), patients under stress, caregivers managing others' health, and clinical staff under time pressure. HIPAA-adjacent: never send PHI in URLs, localStorage, or analytics. Tap targets minimum 48px. Use plain language (grade 6–8 reading level). Always provide emergency contact info (911) for health-critical flows. Error messages must be specific and actionable. Session timeouts must warn with accessible modal. Never use red for non-emergency decorative purposes — it causes patient anxiety.
